pairs.py:
def min_reachable(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Return the minimum node value reachable from start."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; best = None
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n)
        if best is None or vals[n] < best: best = vals[n]
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return best

def count_below(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count reachable nodes whose value is below the threshold."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]; k = spec["threshold"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if v < k: acc += 1
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

def sum_chain(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Sum the values in the chain."""
    items = spec["items"]
    return sum(items) if items else 0

def sum_unlocked(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Sum values over nodes reachable without stepping into locked rooms."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; locked = set(spec["locked"])
    seen = set(); stack = [spec["start"]]; total = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen or n in locked:
            continue
        seen.add(n)
        total += vals[n]
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return total

def avg_over_threshold(spec: dict) -> float:
    """Return the mean of reachable values strictly above cutoff, or 0.0 if none."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]; cutoff = spec["cutoff"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; total = 0; cnt = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if v > cutoff:
            total += v; cnt += 1
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    if cnt == 0: return 0.0
    return total / cnt

def doubled_chain_values(spec: dict) -> list:
    """Collect each chain value doubled, in visit order."""
    values = spec["values"]
    out = []
    for v in values:
        out.append(v * 2)
    return out
